---
title: "Welcome to My Portfolio"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: Images/1760418413278.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/
---

## Biography
Welcome to my data portfolio! I am currently a student at Cal Poly Pomona. My major is Business Administration with specialization in marketing. I am completing my fourth year Spring 2027. I am very excited to obtain my bachelors in business administration. I also work part time in e-commerce and marketing within the women's fashion sector. Specializing in upkeeping and maintaning website data and functionality as well ascreating email and sms marketing campaigns. 

## Education
* **B.S. in Business Administration** | Marketing 

## Core Skills
* **Ecommerce:** Shopify, Website Management, Canva
* **Email Marketing:** Mail Chimp, Constant Connect
* **SMS Marketing:** Upccell, Mailchimp

## Career Aspirations
My career goal is to become a marketing specialist within the entertainment industry. I would love to work for any studio, like Disney, specializing in marketing for movies and entertainment.
